prose:
**Aniline frontier-orbital gap** — DFT, tier `standard` (**B3LYP/def2-TZVP**, density-fit) in PySCF, **gas phase**, charge 0, multiplicity 1. Geometry: user-supplied `/home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/frontier-orbitals-validation/aniline/aniline.xyz`; the DFT was a single point calculation on this geometry, which was not re-optimized. SCF converged in 9 cycles. HOMO = -5.553772 eV, LUMO = -0.2489544 eV → **gap ≈ 5.3048177 eV** (Koopmans-style orbital gap, not an excitation energy).

Live output log: `frontier_orbitals_dft_20240723-112101.out`
